nodes.thesis: Gravity is the ground state in a soliton nesting hierarchy. GM/(rc^2) determines well depth at every level. Same R2 in orbital mechanics as in pipes and wires.

nodes.thesis: R2 = pi/4 is the universal geometric remainder appearing in every circular-to-rectilinear conversion. R2-free products achieve highest measurement precision. R2-dependent observables are limited to engineering precision.

kill_switches.name: cancellation_failure

nodes.thesis: Koide ratio K = (1+a^2/2)/3 is a tautology for N=3. The spacing (a^2 ~ 2 for leptons) is an open problem. K = 2/3 is a saddle on the C3 landscape, not a minimum. The m_tau prediction (1776.97 MeV, miss 0.006%) is conditional on a^2 = 2 exact.

scripts.name: koide_three_sector.py
scripts.description: K and a^2 for leptons, down quarks, up quarks

kill_switches.name: a2_derivation
kill_switches.condition: a^2 = 2 derived from physics (would upgrade from conditional to confirmed)

nodes.thesis: All transcendental constants needed for physics computation can be stored as p/Q where Q = 2^335, giving 100+ digit precision with exact Fraction arithmetic. 35 constants verified. 82/82 PSLQ searches for compact integer relations returned null. Derivation beats search.

kill_switches.name: precision_failure

nodes.thesis: The electroweak sector is overconstrained: 7 DATA-4 inputs determine 11 observables through integer coefficients from SU(2)xU(1). The QED A2 coefficient decomposes into rational + number-theoretic + geometric pieces with 87.4% cancellation. R4 = pi^2/32 enters every loop integral.

kill_switches.name: ew_observable_failure

nodes.thesis: SM parameter count reduces from 19 to 17 via two independent derivations: theta_QCD = 0 (unconditional, energy minimization) and alpha <-> a_e (relabeling, 4.3 ppb). Koide m_tau adds a conditional reduction to 17 if a^2 = 2 exact. CD adds 6 new parameters (net 23).

kill_switches.name: ae_alpha_disagreement

nodes.thesis: The confinement wall (~0.3-2 GeV) is the one zone where perturbative beta function rules do not apply. alpha_s ~ O(1). The boundary has two faces: perturbative above, hadronic below. The map marks it blank and does not pretend to compute through it.

scripts.name: confinement_two_face.py
scripts.description: Map the confinement wall upper and lower faces

kill_switches.name: lattice_qcd_breakthrough
kill_switches.condition: Lattice QCD computes through confinement with integer-traceable coefficients

program_connections.program_soliton_gravity: confinement boundary sits inside the soliton hierarchy
program_connections.program_beta_unification: beta running stops at confinement upper face

nodes.thesis: The appearance of integers 11 and 13 in both gauge theory (betas) and cosmology (DM/baryon, Omega_DM) requires a combinatoric analysis to determine whether the match is statistically significant or a selection effect.

scripts.name: beta_statistical_control.py
scripts.description: Combinatoric probability that random integers match observed pattern

kill_switches.name: high_probability
kill_switches.condition: p > 0.1 — the integer match is likely coincidence

kill_switches.name: low_probability
kill_switches.condition: p < 0.01 — the integer match is unlikely coincidence (would upgrade beta_unification)

program_connections.program_beta_unification: BLOCKS confirmation of integer coincidence significance

nodes.notes: This is the single most important unwritten script in the series. Without it, the (22/13)*pi match could be a fluke.

nodes.thesis: CD gives M_GUT = 10^15.5 GeV. In minimal SU(5), tau_p ~ M_GUT^4 ~ 10^34-35 yr. Hyper-K (2027-2037) can test this window. MSSM gives 10^36-37 (beyond Hyper-K). This is the decisive experiment.

scripts.name: proton_decay_window.py
scripts.description: M_GUT^4 scaling, uncertainty budget, Hyper-K sensitivity

kill_switches.name: hyper_k_detection
kill_switches.condition: Hyper-K detects proton decay in the 10^34-35 window — confirms CD + min SU(5)

kill_switches.name: dune_kaon_channel
kill_switches.condition: DUNE detects p -> K+nu_bar — complementary channel

program_connections.program_gut_threshold: threshold corrections modify M_GUT and tau_p

nodes.thesis: GUT threshold corrections, exact M_VL determination, and three-loop running are the precision frontier. Two-loop with full b_ij improves alpha_s miss from 8.74% (one-loop) to 0.325% (two-loop). Three-loop would constrain M_VL within the 1.5-6 TeV window.

scripts.name: gut_threshold_corrections.py
scripts.description: Threshold corrections at GUT scale in minimal SU(5)

nodes.name: program_gr_reading_mega_depth_v0
nodes.description: GR time dilation as reading depth — mega-experiment testing the reading depth interpretation across gravitational, SR, cosmological, and astrophysical domains

nodes.title: GR Time Dilation as Boundary Reading Depth
nodes.thesis: The fourth coordinate is reading depth — position within the nested soliton boundary hierarchy. GR time dilation IS reading depth. Every GR time dilation measurement is evidence for reading depth. The experiment computes the GR prediction for ~12 measured time dilation effects across the entire soliton hierarchy (lab to cosmological) and compares to published measurements. The reading depth interpretation adds no new predictions to standard GR — it names what the measurements describe.

kill_switches.criterion: Any GR time dilation prediction disagrees with measurement by >5% where the measurement precision is <1%
kill_switches.action: KILL — the reading depth formula (which IS the GR formula) fails, meaning either the computation has a bug or the input values are wrong

kill_switches.criterion: Nuclear clock vs optical clock comparison shows disagreement beyond GR at same gravitational potential
kill_switches.action: UPGRADE — reading depth is force-dependent, not a reinterpretation of GR but new physics. This would be a discovery.

nodes.notes: This program tests the PHYS-41 interpretation: time is reading depth, GR time dilation is the evidence. The experiment is a reinterpretation exercise — every comparison should PASS because the reading depth formula IS the GR formula. Any FAIL is a computational bug, not a physics failure. The program's value is demonstrating that a century of GR time dilation data constitutes evidence for the reading depth interpretation across the full soliton hierarchy.
